subcodes.first_line: O essence of the love of God! Thou didst complain of the infrequency in receiving letters and the paucity of correspondence, and now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوهر حب الله از فتور وصول محررات و قلت مراسلات شکایت فرموده بودید و حال
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause
